violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back kitchen entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

The door to the outside, located in the (Backroom), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the (wall behind 3-bay sink) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces should be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024
The walk in freezer was observed with an accumulation of ice. Establishment is to run a defrost on the unit. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024
